name: KiKit Viewer
description: Visual KiKit panel editor — design and preview PCB panels from within pcbnew
description_full:
KiKit Viewer adds a toolbar button to pcbnew that opens a visual panel editor.
All KiKit panelization parameters (layout, tabs, framing, cuts) are exposed
through a graphical interface with live preview. Requires KiKit >= 1.4 and a
Python 3.11+ environment with PySide6, shapely, and qtawesome installed.
